title: The Neanderthal DNA Puzzle No One Can Explain - David Reich
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews David Reich about unresolved questions in Neanderthal DNA research. The episode focuses on genetic mysteries that remain unexplained despite advances in paleogenomics.
